scope_summary: Prediction quality improvement + agent coordination system

actions: Backfilled genre_tags for 44/52 uncategorized RESOLVED predictions on VPS

Fixed category_brier_analysis.py to handle list genre_tags format
Ran category Brier analysis on VPS with backfilled genre_tags
Discovered catastrophic underconfidence: 0-10% predicted → 70.6% actual HIT rate (n=17)
Improvement actions: base rate rechecking, probability bounds 5-95%, Polymarket comparison mandatory
phases.key_finding: Brier score (0.4759) is inflated primarily by systematic underconfidence, not by wrong-direction calls

actions: Created .coordination/ directory with protocol.json, codex.json, claude-code.json, lock-registry.json
